chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit No. 2100 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.10382/2023 (U/A). 2. For orders on CMA No.10383/2023 (Compromise). 21.07.2023 Ch. Abdul Rasheed, Advocate for the Plaintiff a/w the Plaintiff Syed Muhammad Tanveer Ahmed (CNIC No.42000-0500852-3). Mr. Arshad Lodhi, Advocate for Defendant No.1 a/w Defendant No.1 Syed Muhammad Sohail Ahmed Qutbi (CNIC No.42201-4355516-7)............. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Both Plaintiff and Defendant No.1, real brothers, are present in person. Application under Order XXIII Rule 3 CPC is duly signed by the parties and their Advocates. The Plaintiff and Defendant No.1 have agreed to settle their dispute. Defendant No.1 will not claim his share from the subject property in the suit. The Court has asked Plaintiff and Defendant No.1 present in person, if they have agreed to the mechanism set up in case of default in payment. They confirm understanding the same. Accordingly, the suit is partly decreed against Defendant No.1. The matter shall proceed in normal course with regard to the remaining Defendants. J U D G E
